Video.summary: Witness an unexpected and electrifying Mixed Pro Doubles showdown from the Minto US Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida! Originally scheduled for a back court, this highly anticipated match featuring Andre Agassi and Anna Leigh Waters was moved to Championship Court due to overwhelming crowd demand, creating an unforgettable atmosphere. Relive every moment as these top players battle it out in a thrilling display of professional pickleball. Don't miss the action from East Naples Community Park – the epicenter of pickleball!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Double - Agassi/Waters vs. HuynhMcClain/Yang

Video.summary: Catch the exhilarating Men's Pro Doubles match from the 2025 Minto US Open Pickleball Championships, powered by Margaritaville! Witness incredible action on the Zing Zang Championship Court in Naples, Florida, the paradise coast for pickleball. This thrilling match features the dynamic duo of John Cangelosi and Michael Leonard against their formidable opponents. Get ready for intense rallies, powerful shots, and strategic play from top professional pickleball players. Don't miss this must-watch event from the epicenter of pickleball!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mens Pro Double - Cangelosi/Leonard vs. Tomassi/Gancuart

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mens Pro Double - Cangelosi/Leonard vs. Tomassi/Gancuart
US Open 2025 - Mens Pro Double - Cangelosi/Leonard vs. Tomassi/Gancuart
US Open 2025 - Mens Pro Double - Cangelosi/Leonard vs. Tomassi/Gancuart

Video.summary: Catch all the action from the Women's Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal 1 at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships held in Naples, Florida. This semifinal match features top senior pros Nathalie Bagby and Beth Bellamy facing Jennifer Dawson and Bonnie Williams in a high-stakes contest. Expert commentary highlights key strategies, player strengths, and match dynamics including powerful serves from Ava Welsher, tactical lobs, and intense court positioning. Follow how the players adjust to crowd pressure and timeouts in this best-of-three game format. Get ready for a thrilling showdown in one of pickleball’s premier senior pro events.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal – Bagby & Bellamy vs Dawson & Williams

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal – Bagby & Bellamy vs Dawson & Williams
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal – Bagby & Bellamy vs Dawson & Williams
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Semifinal – Bagby & Bellamy vs Dawson & Williams

Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match

Video.summary: The Boca Raton Picklers face off against the Naples JBB United in a women's NPL match.
Video.title: Picklers vs JBB United (Women)

Image.alt: Picklers vs JBB United (Women)
Picklers vs JBB United (Women)
Picklers vs JBB United (Women)

Video.summary: In the finals of the All Florida Pro League (AFPL) Stop 4 in Sarasota, Florida, the Fort Myers Flamingos and the GMV Chomp go head-to-head. The commentators, including Angel, highlight the youth and fire of Fort Myers player Jade and the consistent dominance of the number one women's team, the GMV Chomp. The match is a best-of-three, rally-scoring format with games to 21. The episode showcases impressive plays from Stevie and Kelsey, and praises Heather Nobler's "nasty" two-handed backhand. The commentators also discuss the challenge for the team coming out of pool number two, which has less rest time before the finals.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 7 - GNV Chomp vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 7 - GNV Chomp vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 7 - GNV Chomp vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 7 - GNV Chomp vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

NCPA Semifinals: Utah Valley vs. UofUtah
NCPA Semifinals: Utah Valley vs. UofUtah

Video.summary: Andrei Daescu & Dave Weinbach take on Altaf Merchant & John Cincola in a Men's Pro Split Age Gold medal match
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Pro Split Age - Gold

US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Pro Split Age - Gold
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Pro Split Age - Gold

Video.summary: Experience the high-octane energy of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) Season 2 as the Bengaluru Jawans go head-to-head with the Rajasthan Titans at the iconic Jio World Garden in Mumbai. The stakes are higher than ever in this Day 9, Tie 16 clash, featuring elite matchups such as the "women's singles player of the season" Katrina Stewart facing off against the resilient Lorena Dupnik. Watch as tactical masters like Dusty Boyer and Jack Foster battle for supremacy in a series of intense singles and mixed doubles competitions where every point counts toward the league standings. With game-changing "Pickle Plays" and atmospheric "drums" fueling the intensity, this tie is a masterclass in professional grit and strategic precision.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Rajasthan - Day 9 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Rajasthan - Day 9 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Rajasthan - Day 9 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Rajasthan - Day 9 Tie 1

Video.summary: Step into the electric Jio World Garden in Mumbai for a high-stakes showdown where the road to the playoffs is on the line. Delhi Dilwale enter this tie in second place, looking to solidify their dominance and secure a "Q" next to their name for a guaranteed spot in the semifinals. On the other side, Pune United are fighting for survival, desperately needing a win after finally breaking their season-long drought earlier in the day. Witness intense matchups as tactical veterans like Trang Huynh and Max Mansoor face off against Pune's resilient stars, including the grit of Katie Morris and the power of William Sobeck. In a league where every rally counts toward the "Band of Honor," these athletes must battle both their opponents and the relentless 15-minute clock in a masterclass of professional pickleball.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Pune - Day 8 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Pune - Day 8 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Pune - Day 8 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Pune - Day 8 Tie 2

Video.summary: Get ready for a one-of-a-kind pickleball experience at the Minto U.S. Open Pickleball Championships, powered by Margaritaville. This video features highlights from the Pro Mixed Doubles match between Valdes/Gabrielsen and Barr/Lane. Watch Brandon Lane's commanding presence on the court, as he strategically positions himself at the kitchen line to capture any balls he can. The tournament is held at a beautiful facility in Naples, Florida, which is unlike any other in the world, and draws tens of thousands of people.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles - Valdes/Gabrielsen vs. Barr/Lane

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles - Valdes/Gabrielsen vs. Barr/Lane
US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles - Valdes/Gabrielsen vs. Barr/Lane
US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles - Valdes/Gabrielsen vs. Barr/Lane

Video.summary: This Pro Women's Doubles match at the Minto US Open Pickleball Championships features the dynamic team of Anna Leigh Waters and Lee Waters facing off against the formidable duo of Walczak and Harris. The Waters team, known for their aggressive play and powerful shots, including Anna Leigh's unique heavy topspin cross-court backhand roll, aim to dominate the court. Walczak, a native of Poland with collegiate tennis experience, and Harris seek to overcome the Waters' early lead and challenge their expected path to the Championship court.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Walczak/Harris

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Walczak/Harris
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Walczak/Harris
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Walczak/Harris

Video.summary: The penultimate day of World Pickleball League Season 2 heats up at Mumbai’s Jio World Garden with a high-stakes rematch of last year's semifinals between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Bengaluru Jawans. The spotlight shines on a "mouthwatering" women's singles clash between two unbeaten titans, Shawn Mendes and Katerina Stewart, where one historic winning streak is destined to end. From tactical mixed doubles experiments to the high-pressure debut of Eduardo Irizarry, every point is a desperate fight to stay "in the hunt" for a final spot. With commentators on the "edge of their seats" witnessing unbelievable defensive plays and "blistering" side outs, this tie is a masterclass in professional grit.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1

Video.summary: November 28, 2023 - Welcome to week 10 - season 2 of The Arizona Pickleball League! It's Tuesday Night Pickleball @ The Orchard, and the Gilbert Gladiators face-off against the Surprise Stingers.
Video.title: November 28, 2023 - AZ PBL

Image.alt: November 28, 2023 - AZ PBL
November 28, 2023 - AZ PBL
November 28, 2023 - AZ PBL

Video.summary: Freddie Powell and Louis Laville take on Wesley Jackson and Bernie Audibert in this critical Men’s Doubles Semifinal from the 2023 English Nationals. With a spot in the championship round on the line, both teams bring their A-game—mixing sharp shot selection, strategic court positioning, and high-pressure execution. Watch as these top British players battle through tight rallies and momentum swings in a must-see semifinal clash.
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Semifinal – Powell & Laville vs Jackson & Audibert

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Semifinal – Powell & Laville vs Jackson & Audibert
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Semifinal – Powell & Laville vs Jackson & Audibert
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Semifinal – Powell & Laville vs Jackson & Audibert

Video.summary: We are live from the Barnes Tennis Center in San Diego, California, for Week 3 of the NCPA San Diego Regional 2025. This thrilling collegiate team match features Grand Canyon University (GCU) taking on the University of Hawaii. The broadcast picks up in the heat of the action during a crucial mixed doubles game, with GCU leading. Watch as the match extends into a dramatic Sudden Death Dreambreaker (Game 7) to decide the winner. The episode highlights the unique collegiate format where every point counts towards seeding for the National Championship. Key players include Hawaii's Tristan Simmons and Tama, battling against GCU's Tanner and Hannah. The match concludes with a high-stakes finish that determines who moves forward in bracket play.
Video.title: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - GCU vs. Hawaii

Image.alt: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - GCU vs. Hawaii
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - GCU vs. Hawaii
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - GCU vs. Hawaii

Video.summary: Texas duo Munro and Manzano take on Florida’s Foster and Chassang in the 2025 DUPR National Championship Men’s Doubles Final, battling for collegiate pickleball glory.
Video.title: Men's Doubles Final - Florida vs. Texas

Image.alt: Men's Doubles Final - Florida vs. Texas
Men's Doubles Final - Florida vs. Texas
Men's Doubles Final - Florida vs. Texas

Video.summary: Witness one of the most exciting finals from the European Pickleball Championships 2025 in Rome. In the Women's Senior Singles Open Final, Team England’s Anna Linton takes on Team Italy’s Paola Tampieri at the iconic Stadio dei Marmi. Linton starts with commanding form, dominating the first game with powerful forehand drives. However, the momentum shifts as Tampieri, fueled by a passionate home crowd, adjusts her strategy to target Linton’s backhand and level the match.
Video.title: Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri

Image.alt: Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri
Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri
Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri
